title: dupatya planifolia
intro: Dupatya planifolia, also known as Javanese patchouli, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. Its medicinal properties have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of digestive issues such as bloating and cramps. Dupatya planifolia can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or in aromatherapy to harness its medicinal properties.
